'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/UKThreatLevel\/UKThreatLevel.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=jzcjUFMmKDmE_ALuaCgX7GVo1H4Qq0T.AukWkExUYCU-1772673792-1.0.1.1-0OPLVVa5fAFEDPQ8X7odgUa_ZgwNQc9TAMFQX31rBdA"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
